zh.lifeSummary: 當David Wemyss of Kincaldrum, of Methil and Wemyss於1394年出生在蘇格蘭費伏維梅斯時，他的父親John Wemyss - Lord of Reres26歲，母親Isabel Erskine20歲。他和Christian Douglas至少有2個兒子和6個女兒。他去世於1430年在他的家鄉享年36歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭費伏易亞斯特 維梅斯。

nameMeanings.name: Wemyss
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Wemyss in Fife, traditionally pronounced ‘weems’. The placename is from Gaelic uaimh ‘cave’ + the placename forming suffix –es. The surname reached Ireland in the 14th century, see Wims .

variants.name: Wims
meanings: Irish: variant of Scottish   Wemyss  , representing the usual pronunciation of that Scottish name.

variants.name: Weems
meanings: Scottish: variant of   Wemyss  , reflecting the usual pronunciation of that name.

History: David Weems (Wemyss) emigrated from Scotland to Herring Bay, Anne Arundel County, MD, some time before 1722. Mason Locke Weems, born near Herring Bay in 1759, was a clergyman who wrote a biography of George Washington, in which the first account of the cherry-tree story appeared.

variants.name: Wymbs
meanings: Irish: variant of Scottish   Wemyss  . Compare   Wims  .

nameMeanings.name: David
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the greatest of all the kings of Israel, whose history is recounted with great vividness in the first and second books of Samuel and elsewhere. As a boy he killed the giant Philistine Goliath with his slingshot. As king of Judah, and later of all Israel, he expanded the power of the Israelites and established the security of their kingdom. He was also noted as a poet, many of the Psalms being attributed to him. The Hebrew derivation of the name is uncertain; it is said by some to represent a nursery word meaning ‘darling’. It is a very popular Jewish name, but is almost equally common among Gentiles in the English-speaking world. It is particularly common in Wales and Scotland, having been borne by the patron saint of Wales (  see  Dewi   ) and by two medieval kings of Scotland.

en.lifeSummary: When David Wemyss of Kincaldrum, of Methil and Wemyss was born in 1394, in Wemyss, Fife, Scotland, his father, John Wemyss - Lord of Reres, was 26 and his mother, Isabel Erskine, was 20. He had at least 2 sons and 6 daughters with Christian Douglas. He died in 1430, in his hometown, at the age of 36, and was buried in East Wemyss, Fife, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque David Wemyss of Kincaldrum, of Methil and Wemyss est né en 1394, à Wemyss, Fife, Écosse, son père, John Wemyss - Lord of Reres, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Isabel Erskine, avait 20 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 6 filles avec Christian Douglas. Il est décédé en 1430, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 36 ans, et a été enterré à East Wemyss, Fife, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.East Wemyss, Fifeshire, Scotland: East Wemyss, Fife, Schottland, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als David Wemyss of Kincaldrum, of Methil and Wemyss 1394 in Wemyss, Fife, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Wemyss - Lord of Reres 26 und seine Mutter Isabel Erskine 20. Er hatte mit Christian Douglas mindestens 2 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb 1430 im Alter von 36 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in East Wemyss, Fife, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando David Wemyss of Kincaldrum, of Methil and Wemyss è nato il nel 1394 nel Wemyss, Fife, Scotland, il suo padre, John Wemyss - Lord of Reres, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Isabel Erskine, aveva 20 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 6 figlie con Christian Douglas. Morì nel 1430, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 36 anni, e fu sepolto a East Wemyss, Fife, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: David Wemyss of Kincaldrum, of Methil and Wemyssが1394年にスコットランドフィフウエムイスで生まれた時，父John Wemyss - Lord of Reresは26歳，母Isabel Erskineは20歳であった。彼はChristian Douglasとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と6人の娘をもうけた。彼は1430年に故郷で36歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドフィフエアスト ウエムイスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: David Wemyss of Kincaldrum, of Methil and Wemyss(이)가 1394년 스컷랜드 피프 베미스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Wemyss - Lord of Reres(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel Erskine(은)는 20세였다. 그는 Christian Douglas(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1430년 그의 고향에서 36세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 피프 이스트 베미스에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда David Wemyss of Kincaldrum, of Methil and Wemyss родился в 1394 г. в местности вемисс, фиф, Шотландия, его отцу по имени John Wemyss - Lord of Reres было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel Erskine, 20. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 6 дочерей от Christian Douglas. Он умер в 1430 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 36 лет и был похоронен в местности эаст вемисс, фиф, Шотландия, Великобритания.
